title: crispy golden portuguese fish bake
description: A sweet and creamy portuguese dish featuring fish seasoning, wood-fired bake, and pescatarian-friendly ingredients. Perfect for a cozy night in or a special occasion.

ingredients.name: portuguese fish seasoning
ingredients.notes: available at most grocery stores or online

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together thinly sliced onion and minced garlic.
Add the lemon juice, olive oil, and portuguese fish seasoning to the bowl and toss to combine.
Add the cod fillets to the bowl and coat with the onion and garlic mixture, making sure each fillet is well-coated.
Arrange the cod fillets in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each fillet.
Bake the cod in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through and flakes easily with a fork.
While the cod is baking, prepare the creamy mashed potatoes according to package instructions.
Once the cod is done, remove it from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve each cod fillet with a scoop of creamy mashed potatoes and a sprinkle of chopped parsley, and drizzle with melted butter.
Garnish with additional parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
